sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ سَامِي أَنْ يَفْتَتِحَ شَرِكَتَهُ النَّاشِئَةَ الْخَاصَّةَ بَعْدَ التَّخَرُّجِ.
sentences.translation: Sami je odlučio otvoriti svoju vlastitu startup kompaniju nakon diplomiranja.
sentences.translationEn: Sami decided to open his own startup company after graduation.

sentences.arabic: بَحَثَ عَنْ مَكْتَبٍ صَغِيرٍ وَوَظَّفَ مُصَمِّمًا مُبْدِعًا جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Potražio je malu kancelariju i zaposlio veoma kreativnog dizajnera.
sentences.translationEn: He looked for a small office and hired a very creative designer.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يَعْمَلُ بِجِدٍّ لِتَحْقِيقِ طُمُوحَاتِهِ فِي عَالَمِ الْأَعْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Vrijedno radi kako bi ostvario svoje ambicije u poslovnom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: He works hard to achieve his ambitions in the business world.
